title: Potion Granules
description: Changed the traditional ways to get potions
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf532f15ea79c84e6e5aa9cf259a7f7be6fc110a.png)



当你加载组件时，你能合成冲剂，你需要一小瓶烧开过的水来合成才能喝下去，之后会获得原版药水效果，不同的药水有不同的合成方式，包括药水的等级大小也决定于合成方式，相当于较为前期的时候，合成低等级的药水还是较方便的(~~个人体验效果来说~~)，然后我们又添加了一个新的维度叫药水世界，与主世界不同的是这个维度里有大量的药水湖，不同的药水湖能给予不同的效果，但出于某种原因，这些药水不能用来喝的，~~听说是防止懒人药水机的~~。除此之外，我们还添加了一些矿物，心之宝石能给予你生命恢复效果；白金能给予你更强的防御等等。剩下的我就不多剧透了，自己去探索吧!

EB工作室出品


bug反馈入口modbugreport@foxmail.com


高版本翻译可能出现bug，我们会在mod完成开发时上传修复版本（理想的）

When you play Minecraft with this mod ,you can craft things called granules , to use it you need a little bottle of bolied water ,Drink it when you mix it up and you can get class effects,The effect depends on the different leve of granules. So you can get some potion easily in the early , and there will have a new dimension called "Potion World”,In the Potion World , you can find Potion lake(There was only 7 potion have the lake) ,you can find a new ore called Heart Gem under the ground ,It's have a special effect when you suit it up or pick tools are made of it,and so on!

The mod is developed by EB Studio


If you found some bugs at were playing Minecraft with this mod , please send a feedback to e-mail(modbugreport@foxmail.com).
Attention:There were a lot of things in the testing phase here and the mod only supported English and Chinese(Simplified)now
